Hire counsel without the blind handoff

AI
Intake that structures facts
COI
Double-blind conflict checks
Escrow
Milestone-protected fees
Meet
Encrypted video consults

From story to matched counsel

Marketplace is built around intake — not a static directory dump.

Conversational intake

Clients describe their situation in plain language. Barristrly extracts practice area, jurisdiction, urgency, and a clean brief for counsel.

Match with intent

Ranking considers practice fit, jurisdiction, availability, and outcome signals — not just directory keywords.

Consent and escrow

Before a consult, both sides confirm scope. Funds sit in escrow until milestones clear.

From lead to matter

When you engage, the thread becomes a living matter with notes, documents, billing, and next actions.

Built for clients and counsel

Clients get clarity and protected spend. Lawyers get qualified leads into PracticeOS.
